name: SWE-bench Verified
whyItMatters: Primary v1 live task source for real repository debugging and patch production.

name: NL2RepoBench
whyItMatters: Observes Codex on zero-to-one software delivery where the harness must coordinate repository construction, dependency setup, and test closure from scratch.

name: NewtonBench
whyItMatters: Observes Codex as an exploratory agent in a controlled scientific experimentation loop, which is ideal for studying layered state, externalized coordination, and regulation behavior.

name: Terminal-Bench
whyItMatters: Useful for observing command sequencing, environment manipulation, and shell-centric reasoning loops.

name: RepoBench
whyItMatters: Useful for studying search, retrieval, repository comprehension, and instruction stratification under codebase scale.

name: Aider Polyglot Benchmark
whyItMatters: Useful for comparing Codex behavior across ecosystems and tooling cultures.

name: Long-Context Synthetic Patch Tasks
whyItMatters: Useful for isolating compaction continuity, persistence half-life, and activation-threshold effects under controlled conditions.
